case_title: EXCHANGE DATA INTERNATIONAL, LTD. VS. QUANTAL INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: ATTORNEY'S CERTIFICATE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXCHANGE DATA INTERNATIONAL, LTD.
